raw: {"perspective": "Code Quality Engineer", "findings": [{"severity": "low", "file_or_area": "atlas_swarm_daemon.py", "issue": "The self-check loop may create noise if not properly tuned, potentially leading to unnecessary tasks.", "recommended_fix": "Implement a noise reduction mechanism, such as a task throttling system."}, {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "PerspectiveRegistry.update()", "issue": "The update method is called after every task, which may lead to performance issues if not optimized.", "recommended_fix": "Consider batching updates or optimizing the update method for better performance."}, {"severity": "low", "file_or_area": "safe executors", "issue": "The added safe executors may have unintended consequences if not properly tested.", "recommended_fix": "Thoroughly test the safe executors to ensure they do not introduce any bugs or security vulnerabilities."}], "overall_verdict": "pass", "whistleblower_flag": null}

findings.issue: The self-check loop may create noise if not properly tuned, potentially leading to unnecessary tasks.
findings.recommended_fix: Implement a noise reduction mechanism, such as a task throttling system.

findings.issue: The update method is called after every task, which may lead to performance issues if not optimized.
findings.recommended_fix: Consider batching updates or optimizing the update method for better performance.

findings.issue: The added safe executors may have unintended consequences if not properly tested.
findings.recommended_fix: Thoroughly test the safe executors to ensure they do not introduce any bugs or security vulnerabilities.
